current_implemented_build: V56.3 Universal Score Object and Score Band Contract
patch_type: Universal score contract over V56.2 decision records and V56 model registry
release_chain_status: V56.3 is the current implemented build. It loads after V56.2 in src/ui/v52-7-operational-layer.js. It formalizes the required score object, universal score bands, runtime action ladder, and model trace fields while preserving decision records, evidence register, model explanations, registry-rendered TrustMap, thick neon-blue CyberShield Core shield boundary, Purpose Protocol, and no-new-top-level-tabs rule. GitHub Pages browser QA is required after deploy.
top_level_tab_rule: Do not add more top-level tabs. Upgrade existing workspaces only.
version_label_rule: Build and version labels belong in Settings/admin metadata and repo documentation only. They must not appear as executive-facing dashboard content.
public_naming_rule: Public product name is CyberShield Executive OS. Current prototype build is V56.3. Do not call the public build CyberShield OS v8 unless the repo, README, loader, Settings/admin metadata, and public UX intentionally move to that version scheme.
controlling_doctrine: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
v56_3_changes: exposes the contract in Architecture, Evidence, and Proof Pack
preserves V56.1 Evidence and Assumption Register
preserves V56 Trust Model Registry and Score Explanation Layer

universal_score_contract.boundary: Static advisory prototype contract only. No live scoring, enforcement, evidence retrieval, certification, or production-calibrated scoring.

decision_record_hardening.boundary: Static advisory records only. No live approvals, ticketing, enforcement, evidence retrieval, banking verification, or compliance validation.

trust_model_registry.boundary: Demo-directional advisory models only. No certification, live evidence retrieval, legal determination, or production-calibrated scoring.

trustmap_interaction_layer.boundary: Static advisory navigation only. Does not create tickets, retrieve evidence, send notifications, or trigger live workflows.

internet_trust_engine_future_track.sequence_note: Do not implement before Trust Scoring Models, score object contract, model traces, evidence register, decision records, and Proof Pack defensibility are stable.

recommended_next_build.label: V56.4 Core Trust Scoring Models MVP
goals: create the first seven Trust Scoring Models as versioned JSON
wire model registry index without adding top-level tabs

prototype_boundary: The current GitHub Pages build is a lightweight static advisory prototype. It is not connected to live enterprise telemetry, SIEM, EDR, IAM, Microsoft 365, cloud control planes, GRC tooling, production agent enforcement, Google Sheets, CRM sync, ticketing, notifications, marketplace systems, ad platforms, domain-intelligence systems, identity verification systems, CMMC certification systems, healthcare compliance validation systems, banking/payment systems, live evidence retrieval, internet claim verification, or takedown automation.
known_limitations: Universal score contract is a prototype contract, not production-calibrated scoring
Score bands are advisory defaults and may require stricter thresholds for some models
Score contract does not perform live calculations
Decision records use static prototype data
Evidence states do not retrieve or validate live evidence
Model explanations are demo-directional and not statistically validated
Internet Trust Engine is documented as a future requirement track but is not yet implemented
GitHub Pages browser QA required after deploy
